subject: [PATCH 2/4] btrfs: pre-allocate delayed dir index before btree modification

2026-07-17.patch_summary: This patch modifies the btrfs_insert_dir_item function to pre-allocate delayed dir index resources before modifying the btree. This change prevents ENOMEM failures from leaving the btree in a partially-modified state, and allows for more graceful error handling. The patch also introduces an optional parameter to allow callers to provide their own pre-allocated resources.
